UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeOvenType represents a generic oven from the WS Bake domain, which serves as a supertype for tunnel or rack ovens.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Consumption: Provides information about the consumption. Provides information about the consumption.
UAMachineryEM:Electricity: This data point gives the consumption of electricity. This data point gives the consumption of electricity.
UAWSBasis:Water: This data tag gives the amount of water which has been consumed. This data tag gives the amount of water which has been consumed.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBasis:TemperatureProductCore: Indicates the temperature in the product core. Indicates the temperature in the product core.
UAWSBasis:TemperatureElectricalCabinet: Provides information about the temperature electrical cabinet. Provides information about the temperature electrical cabinet.
UAWSBake:PressureChimneyFlueSteam: Provides information about the pressure chimney flue steam. Provides information about the pressure chimney flue steam.
UAWSBake:PressureChimneyFlueGas: Provides information about the pressure chimney flue gas. Provides information about the pressure chimney flue gas.
UAMachinery:Status: Provides information about the status. Provides information about the status.
UAWSBasis:PackMLBaseStateMachine: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine. Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
UAWSBasis:OperatingMode: Provides information about the operating mode. Provides information about the operating mode.
UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: Provides information about the machinery building blocks. Provides information about the machinery building blocks.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the monitoring.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBasis:PackMLBaseStateMachine: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine. Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
UAWSBasis:OperatingMode: Provides information about the operating mode. Provides information about the operating mode.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
Provides information about the operating mode.
Provides information about the machinery building blocks.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeTunnelOvenMultiLayerType represents a multi-layer tunnel oven for continuous baking in the WS Bake domain. The products are transported through the oven on several conveyor belts arranged vertically one above the other, with each conveyor belt forming a separate continuous baking path with independently controllable temperature zones. Each level can be modeled as a sequence of baking zones. Represents a tunnel oven for a continuous baking process. The products are transported through the oven on a belt or carrier system and pass through several temperature zones that can be controlled individually.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:<Layer>: This mandatory placeholder represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. Each level transports a product stream via its own belt and comprises one or more baking zones, which may differ in their heating principle. This mandatory placeholder represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. Each level transports a product stream via its own belt and comprises one or more baking zones, which may differ in their heating principle. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: This mandatory placeholder represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. Each level transports a product stream via its own belt and comprises one or more baking zones, which may differ in their heating principle.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeTunnelOvenSingleLayerType represents a tunnel oven in the WS Bake domain for a continuous baking process with one level. The products are transported through the oven on a belt or carrier system and pass through several temperature zones that can be controlled individually.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:SingleLayer: The SingelLayer represents a baking level within the tunnel oven. The SingelLayer represents a baking level within the tunnel oven.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: The SingelLayer represents a baking level within the tunnel oven.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeDeckOvenType represents a deck oven in the WS Bake domain for batch baking with several horizontally separated baking chambers (decks) arranged one above the other. Each deck forms an independent baking zone with its own temperature control and baking parameters. Depending on the oven design, multiple decks can be instantiated, with each deck modeled as a separate baking zone. Specific heating principles applied per deck should be represented using subtypes of the WSAirConditioningZoneType such as WSCirculatingAirZoneType or WSRadiationZoneType.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:<Deck>: Provides information about the < deck>. Provides information about the < deck>. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.
UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBake:TotalBakingSteps: Indicates the total number of baking steps in the current baking process. Indicates the total number of baking steps in the current baking process.
UAWSBake:ActualBakingStep: Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process. Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process.

UAWSBasis:FeedingTemperature: Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. In special machine construction, there are often differences between individual manufacturers. In this case, it was possible to agree on the specification of the FeedingTemperature. However, it depends on both the manufacturer and the process whether the actual value and/or the setpoint value is specified.

UAMachineryProcessValues:ProcessValueSetpoint: Provides information about the process value setpoint. Provides information about the process value setpoint. For this reason, this data point is defined by the BaseObjectType with an optional ProcessValueSetpoint. If the current process value is to be monitored, the BaseObjectType in the instance must be changed to a ProcessValueType from CS OPC 40001-2: OPC UA for Machinery – Part 2: Process Values.
UAPADIM:AnalogSignal: Provides information about the analog signal. Provides information about the analog signal.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighHighLimit: Provides information about the high high limit. Provides information about the high high limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighLimit: Provides information about the high limit. Provides information about the high limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLimit: Provides information about the low limit. Provides information about the low limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLowLimit: Provides information about the low low limit. Provides information about the low low limit.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the < deck>.

UAWSBake:ActualBakingStep: Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process. Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process.

UAWSBasis:FeedingTemperature: Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. In special machine construction, there are often differences between individual manufacturers. In this case, it was possible to agree on the specification of the FeedingTemperature. However, it depends on both the manufacturer and the process whether the actual value and/or the setpoint value is specified.

For this reason, this data point is defined by the BaseObjectType with an optional ProcessValueSetpoint. If the current process value is to be monitored, the BaseObjectType in the instance must be changed to a ProcessValueType from CS OPC 40001-2: OPC UA for Machinery – Part 2: Process Values.

UAObject.Description: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeRackOvenType represents a rack oven for batch baking in the WS Bake domain. The products are baked on movable racks within the baking chamber, each of which corresponds to a convection zone.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:BakingZone: This mandatory placeholder stands for an air temperature control zone and its configuration. This mandatory placeholder stands for an air temperature control zone and its configuration.
UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBake:TotalBakingSteps: Indicates the total number of baking steps in the current baking process. Indicates the total number of baking steps in the current baking process.
UAWSBake:ActualBakingStep: Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process. Indicates the current baking step in the current baking process.

UAWSBasis:FeedingTemperature: Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. Provides information about the preheating temperature when feeding the oven. In special machine construction, there are often differences between individual manufacturers. In this case, it was possible to agree on the specification of the FeedingTemperature. However, it depends on both the manufacturer and the process whether the actual value and/or the setpoint value is specified.

UAMachinery:Status: Provides information about the status. Provides information about the status.
UAWSBake:DoorOpen: Indicates whether the door of the rack oven is open (True) or closed (False). Indicates whether the door of the rack oven is open (True) or closed (False).

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:DoorOpen: Indicates whether the door of the rack oven is open (True) or closed (False). Indicates whether the door of the rack oven is open (True) or closed (False).

UAObject.Description: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeOvenLoadingSystemType represents a system for automatically loading and unloading multi-level batch ovens from the WS Bake domain. The system positions product carriers or trays on specific oven floors and can also support unloading operations after baking.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Consumption: Provides information about the consumption. Provides information about the consumption.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.

UAWSBake:UnloadingCycleCounter: Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter. Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter.

UAWSBake:LoadingCycleCounter: Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter. Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter.
UAMachinery:Status: Provides information about the status. Provides information about the status.
UAWSBasis:PackMLBaseStateMachine: Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine. Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
UAWSBasis:OperatingMode: Provides information about the operating mode. Provides information about the operating mode.
UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: Provides information about the machinery building blocks. Provides information about the machinery building blocks.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the monitoring.

UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.

UAWSBake:UnloadingCycleCounter: Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter. Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter.

UAWSBake:LoadingCycleCounter: Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter. Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter.
UAMachinery:Status: Provides information about the status. Provides information about the status.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the consumption.
Provides information about the process.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:UnloadingCycleCounter: Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter. Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter.

UAWSBake:LoadingCycleCounter: Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter. Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter.

UAVariable.Description: Indicates the total number of unloading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the LoadingCycleCounter.
Indicates the total number of beading operations. The count value is not reset or is only reset at the same time as the UnloadingCycleCounter.

Provides information about the Pack ML base state machine.
Provides information about the operating mode.
Provides information about the machinery building blocks.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeVolumetricDividerAndRounderType represents a machine from the WS Bake domain for continuous volumetric dividing and rounding of dough. The machine divides the dough into portions of a defined volume and shapes them into round forms.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachineryJobs:JobManagement: Provides information about the job management. Provides information about the job management.

UAWSBasis:SpraySystem: Provides information about the spray system and its configuration for coating products with oil. Provides information about the spray system and its configuration for coating products with oil.

UAWSBake:PrePortioner: Provides information about the pre-portioner, which has a large hopper with star rollers. Provides information about the pre-portioner, which has a large hopper with star rollers.

This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeMakeUpTableType represents a support table for shaping and finishing laminated or rolled dough products in the WS Bake domain. The machine consists of a modular conveyor system that integrates shaping, cutting, filling, and folding units.

This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeLaminatingMachineType represents a machine from the WS Bake domain for producing laminated dough by alternately layering dough and fat. The machine typically performs repeated folding and rolling operations to achieve the desired number of layers. Laminating machines may include components such as fat extruders, cross rolls, and folding stations. They are often integrated into continuous dough sheet lines.

This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeCalibrationStationType represents a machine used to calibrate and shape a dough strip to a defined thickness and width. It is used in both laminated and non-laminated dough processes to ensure consistent dough sheet quality for further processing. Depending on the application, the station can include several forming and reducing components, such as satellite heads, cross rolls, calibrators, flour sprinklers, or needle rolls.

This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeMixerType is a dough mixer consisting of a mixing head with mixing tools and a mixing base on which the movable bowl is securely positioned and driven. The mixer is opened and closed by a hydraulic system.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeBottomDischargeMixerType represents dough mixers equipped with a bottom discharge mechanism to empty the dough onto a conveyor belt or into a bowl after the mixing process is complete.

This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSBakeBottomDischargerMixingSystemType represents a complete mixing system from the WS Bake domain, which comprises at least one bottom discharge mixer and either a conveyor belt for discharging the dough or a tray transport system in which the dough is discharged into a movable bowl.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:<BottomDischargeMixer>: The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about the bottom discharge mixer. The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about the bottom discharge mixer. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.
UAWSBake:BowlTransportSystem: Provides information about the bowl transport system. Provides information about the bowl transport system.
UAWSBasis:TransportBelt: Provides information about the transport belt. Provides information about the transport belt.
UAWSBasis:Motor: Provides information about the motor. Provides information about the motor.

UAWSBasis:<Position>: The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about a position. The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about a position. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about the bottom discharge mixer.
Provides information about the bowl transport system.
Provides information about the transport belt.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBasis:Motor: Provides information about the motor. Provides information about the motor.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the motor.
The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about a position.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSContinousProofingStationType represents a continuous proofing station in the WS Bake domain and is used in automated baking lines. The products are transported through a controlled proofing climate. This type serves as the basis for various continuously operating proofing systems, including belt systems, plate carriers, and swivel carriers (see WSSwingProofingStationType). Each climate zone within the station is modeled as a component of type WSAirConditioningZoneType. To represent the heating or air circulation principle used (e.g., convection or radiation), appropriate subtypes should be used.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachinery:Monitoring: Provides information about the monitoring. Provides information about the monitoring.
UAMachinery:Consumption: Provides information about the consumption. Provides information about the consumption.
UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBake:TotalProofingTime: Provides information about the total proofing time. Provides information about the total proofing time.
UAMachinery:Status: Provides information about the status. Provides information about the status.
UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: Provides information about the machinery building blocks. Provides information about the machinery building blocks.

UAWSBake:<ClimateZone>: The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about climate zones within the WSBakeContinousProofingStationType. The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about climate zones within the WSBakeContinousProofingStationType. The WSAirConditioningZoneType type can be changed to the WSRadiationZoneType or WSCirculatingAirZoneType subtype in the instance. This allows a client to obtain additional information about the ClimateZones. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.
UAWSBasis:RelativeAirHumidity: Provides information about the relative air humidity within this zone. Provides information about the relative air humidity within this zone.
UAWSBasis:ElectricalHeater: Provides information about the electrical heater. Provides information about the electrical heater.

UAWSBasis:Duration: The duration indicates how long a product remains in a specific temperature zone before it moves to the next zone or leaves the last zone. The duration indicates how long a product remains in a specific temperature zone before it moves to the next zone or leaves the last zone.
UAMachineryProcessValues:ProcessValueSetpoint: Provides information about the process value setpoint. Provides information about the process value setpoint.
UAPADIM:AnalogSignal: Provides information about the analog signal. Provides information about the analog signal.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighHighLimit: Provides information about the high high limit. Provides information about the high high limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighLimit: Provides information about the high limit. Provides information about the high limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLimit: Provides information about the low limit. Provides information about the low limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLowLimit: Provides information about the low low limit. Provides information about the low low limit.
UAWSBasis:ElectricalHeater: Provides information about the electrical heater. Provides information about the electrical heater.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the monitoring.

UAMachinery:Process: Provides information about the process. Provides information about the process.
UAWSBake:TotalProofingTime: Provides information about the total proofing time. Provides information about the total proofing time.

UAVariable.Description: Provides information about the total proofing time.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the status.
Provides information about the machinery building blocks.
The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about climate zones within the WSBakeContinousProofingStationType.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBasis:RelativeAirHumidity: Provides information about the relative air humidity within this zone. Provides information about the relative air humidity within this zone.

UAWSBasis:Duration: The duration indicates how long a product remains in a specific temperature zone before it moves to the next zone or leaves the last zone. The duration indicates how long a product remains in a specific temperature zone before it moves to the next zone or leaves the last zone.
UAMachineryProcessValues:ProcessValueSetpoint: Provides information about the process value setpoint. Provides information about the process value setpoint.
UAPADIM:AnalogSignal: Provides information about the analog signal. Provides information about the analog signal.
UAMachineryProcessValues:HighHighLimit: Provides information about the high high limit. Provides information about the high high limit.

UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLimit: Provides information about the low limit. Provides information about the low limit.
UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLowLimit: Provides information about the low low limit. Provides information about the low low limit.
UAWSBasis:ElectricalHeater: Provides information about the electrical heater. Provides information about the electrical heater.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the relative air humidity within this zone.
Provides information about the electrical heater.
The duration indicates how long a product remains in a specific temperature zone before it moves to the next zone or leaves the last zone.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachineryProcessValues:ProcessValueSetpoint: Provides information about the process value setpoint. Provides information about the process value setpoint.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAMachineryProcessValues:HighHighLimit: Provides information about the high high limit. Provides information about the high high limit.

UAMachineryProcessValues:LowLimit: Provides information about the low limit. Provides information about the low limit.

Provides information about the high limit.
Provides information about the low limit.
Provides information about the low low limit.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the electrical heater.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObjectType.Description: The WSSwingProofingStationType represents a swing-type continuous proofing station used for gentle proofing of dough products while they are suspended on movable carriers. It is typically used as a large-scale component in an automated baking line and provides controlled climate conditions for continuous operation. The air conditioning can be represented by suitable subtypes of WSAirConditioningZoneType.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBake:<SwingChain>: The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about the swing chains on which the troughs are located within the WSBakeSwingProofingStation. The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about the swing chains on which the troughs are located within the WSBakeSwingProofingStation. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.
UAWSBasis:InfeedBelt: Provides information about the infeed belt. Provides information about the infeed belt.
UAWSBasis:Positioning: Provides information about the positioning device. Provides information about the positioning device.

UAWSBasis:<InterConsumptionteBelt>: The instances of the optional placeholder provide information about inter-consumption belts within the WSBakeSwingProofingStation. The instances of the optional placeholder provide information about inter-consumption belts within the WSBakeSwingProofingStation. This standard does not specify the browse name of the instances of this placeholder. It is recommended to use the nomenclature of the operating company or to use self-explanatory identifiers.
UAWSBasis:Positioning: Provides information about the positioning device. Provides information about the positioning device.
UAWSBasis:OutfeedBelt: Provides information about the outfeed belt. Provides information about the outfeed belt.
UAWSBasis:Positioning: Provides information about the positioning device. Provides information about the positioning device.
UAWSBasis:CleaningUnit: Provides information about the cleaning unit. Provides information about the cleaning unit.

UAWSBake:SterilizationDevice: Provides information about the SterilizationDevice, which is used for contactless reduction of microbiological contamination on surfaces using electromagnetic radiation such as ultraviolet (UV) or infrared (IR) light. Provides information about the SterilizationDevice, which is used for contactless reduction of microbiological contamination on surfaces using electromagnetic radiation such as ultraviolet (UV) or infrared (IR) light. The type WSRadiationSterilizationDeviceType can be changed in the instance to the subtype WSInfraredRadiationSterilizationDeviceType or WSUVRadiationSterilizationDeviceType. This allows a client to obtain additional information about whether the application is based on infrared or UV sterilization.
UAWSBasis:CuttingStation: Provides information about the cutting station within the swing proofing station. Provides information about the cutting station within the swing proofing station.

UAMachinery:MachineryBuildingBlocks: This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine. This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.

UAObject.Description: The instances of the mandatory placeholder provide information about the swing chains on which the troughs are located within the WSBakeSwingProofingStation.
Provides information about the infeed belt.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBasis:Positioning: Provides information about the positioning device. Provides information about the positioning device.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the positioning device.
The instances of the optional placeholder provide information about inter-consumption belts within the WSBakeSwingProofingStation.

Extension.uawsbake:ImplementationNote: UAWSBasis:Positioning: Provides information about the positioning device. Provides information about the positioning device.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the positioning device.
Provides information about the outfeed belt.

UAObject.Description: Provides information about the positioning device.
Provides information about the cleaning unit.

Provides information about the SterilizationDevice, which is used for contactless reduction of microbiological contamination on surfaces using electromagnetic radiation such as ultraviolet (UV) or infrared (IR) light.
Provides information about the cutting station within the swing proofing station.
This building block refers to all Machinery building blocks used that are defined in the CS series OPC UA Machinery (OPC 40001) and are used by a WSMachine.
